name: Kristen Wiig
blurb: A prolific character comedian and one of SNL's most versatile players.
bio: Kristen Wiig is an American comedian and actress who was a standout Saturday Night Live cast member from 2005 to 2012, known for characters like Target Lady and the one-upping Penelope. She co-wrote and starred in the hit film Bridesmaids, earning an Academy Award nomination for its screenplay.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
